---
doi: "10.32942/X26W9V"
---

# Default (no type attribute, Altmetric default style)
{{< altmetrics >}}

# Default (no type attribute, Altmetric default style)
{{< altmetrics details = true >}}

# Small donut
{{< altmetrics type=donut >}}

# Medium donut
{{< altmetrics type=medium-donut >}}

# Large donut with details
{{< altmetrics type=large-donut details=true >}}

# Bar chart (small/medium)
{{< altmetrics type=bar >}}

# Medium bar with details
{{< altmetrics type=medium-bar details=true >}}

# Large bar
{{< altmetrics type=large-bar >}}
